  в”‚ function ts(i){вЂ¦
  в”” 22 lines...


в—Џ Now update the canvas summary widget, save output, and signal done.


в—Џ Save output, update widget, signal done (shell)
  в”‚ ENV_FILE=$(ls -t .storyboard/terminals/*.env 2>/dev/null | head -1); source "$ENV_FILE"
  в”‚ SUMMARY='Refreshed data (same shape, new values):
  в”‚
  в”‚ workspace: nimbus-forge / Acropolis
  в”‚ user: Idris Okafor (@idris)вЂ¦
  в”” 33 lines...


в—Џ Done. Regenerated all data with new values while keeping the exact same schema (so Scaffold/Charts work
  unchanged):

   - workspace: nimbus-forge / Acropolis
   - user: Idris Okafor (@idris)
   - summary: CPU
    42.50% (17/40 vCPUs), Memory 71.25% (285/400 GiB), Storage 33.75% (2.7/8 TiB)
   - timeRange: 22:42 в†’ 23:42
   - metrics: cpu ~380вЂ“460, memory 215в†’285 rising, storage ~2.7 flat (30 samples, 22:44вЂ“23:42)

  Canvas markdown widget updated, output saved for peers, agent signaled done.
